ogTitle: Knorrit Flat vs Kogarah: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Knorrit Flat and Kogarah.
heading: Knorrit Flat vs Kogarah — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Knorrit Flat, New South Wales and Kogarah, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Knorrit Flat has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Kogarah (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Knorrit Flat or Kogarah safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Knorrit Flat has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Kogarah scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Knorrit Flat scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Kogarah scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Knorrit Flat or Kogarah?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Knorrit Flat has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
